title: Single Number II
hints: Think about counting bits at each position.
If every element appears thrice, the count of 1s at each bit position should be divisible by 3.
For each bit position, count how many numbers have that bit set. If the count is not divisible by 3, that bit should be set in the answer.
Process each bit position from 0 to 31 (for 32-bit integers).
